if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND t.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND t.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND t.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND t.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdTag :: selectById */ t.* , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM pd_prod_tag t LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = t.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id WHERE t.prod_tag_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdTag :: selectList */ t.* , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM pd_prod_tag t LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = t.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdTag :: selectPageList */ t.* , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM pd_prod_tag t LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = t.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(t.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdTag :: selectPageCount */ FROM pd_prod_tag t
